common.api_not_connected: API not connected. Run: uvicorn api.main:app --reload
common.cannot_connect_start: Cannot connect to API. Start the server first.
common.could_not_connect: Could not connect to API. Ensure the backend is running.
common.start_api_hint: Start the API server with: `uvicorn api.main:app --reload`

home.modules_table:
| Module | Page | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| M4: Strategy | Hierarchy | Plant hierarchy viewer (6 levels) |
| M4: Strategy | Criticality | 11-criteria criticality matrix |
| M4: Strategy | FMEA | Failure modes (72-combo validated) + RCM decisions |
| M4: Strategy | Strategy | Tasks, work packages, naming validation |
| GECAMIN | Analytics | KPIs, health scores, Weibull prediction |
| M4: Strategy | SAP Review | SAP upload approval gate |
| Admin | Overview | System stats, database management, audit log |
home.getting_started:
### Getting Started

1. Start the API server: `uvicorn api.main:app --reload`
2. Seed the database: Click "Seed Database" on the Overview page
3. Navigate through the pages in the sidebar
home.safety_first:
### Safety-First Design

All AI outputs enter as **DRAFT** status. Human approval is required at every gate.
SAP uploads are **NEVER** auto-submitted.

hierarchy.title: Plant Hierarchy
hierarchy.no_plants: No plants found. Seed the database first from the Admin page.
hierarchy.no_nodes: No nodes found for this plant.
hierarchy.empty_state_desc: Click on any item in the hierarchy tree to view its details

criticality.title: Criticality Assessment
criticality.no_assessment: No assessment yet. Use the form to create one.
criticality.no_equipment: No equipment nodes found. Seed the database first.

fmea.title: FMEA — Functions & Failure Modes
fmea.no_functions: No functions defined for this node.
fmea.no_ff: No functional failures for this function.
fmea.no_fm: No failure modes for this functional failure.
fmea.select_node_first: Select a node in the tree to view its functions.

strategy.title: Maintenance Strategy
strategy.select_node_first: Select a node in the tree to view its maintenance tasks.
strategy.no_tasks_for_node: No maintenance tasks found for this node.
strategy.select_task_detail: Select a task in the grid to view its details.
strategy.no_wps_for_node: No work packages found for this plant.
strategy.select_wp_first: Select a work package to view details.

sap.title: SAP Upload Review
sap.safety_warning: Safety-first: All SAP uploads must be human-approved before submission.
sap.no_packages: No SAP upload packages yet. Complete the strategy workflow first.

overview.title: System Overview
overview.api_key_configured: Anthropic API key configured. AI agents available.
overview.no_api_key: No API key configured. AI agent workflows require ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env

capture.title: Field Capture Simulator
capture.subtitle: Simulate a field technician submitting a failure observation from the plant.
capture.no_captures: No captures yet. Submit one above.

work_requests.title: Work Request Queue
work_requests.subtitle: Review AI-structured work requests. Approve, modify, or reject.
work_requests.no_requests: No work requests found. Submit a field capture to generate one.

planner.title: Planner Assistant
planner.subtitle: Generate AI recommendations for work requests. Review materials, workforce, scheduling, and risk.
planner.no_requests: No work requests available. Submit a field capture first.
planner.groupable: Can be grouped with {count} backlog item(s)

backlog.title: Backlog & Schedule
backlog.subtitle: View backlog stratification, run optimization, and review the proposed schedule.
backlog.no_items: No backlog items. Validate work requests and add them to the backlog.
backlog.no_schedule: No schedule available. Run an optimization first.

scheduling.title: Weekly Scheduling
scheduling.subtitle: Create weekly programs, review resources, and visualize the Gantt chart.
scheduling.no_programs: No programs found. Create one above.
scheduling.create_first_resources: Create a program first to see resource utilization.
scheduling.no_gantt: No Gantt data available for this program.
scheduling.create_first_gantt: Create a program first to see the Gantt chart.
scheduling.no_crew_data: No crew data found. Seed the database or adjust filters.
scheduling.tasks_json_help: Paste task list as JSON array with task_id, work_package_id, name, competency_requirements, estimated_hours.

reliability.title: Advanced Reliability Engineering
reliability.subtitle: Spare parts, shutdowns, MoC, cost-risk, bad actor analysis, and inspections.
reliability.sd_schedule_desc: Generate a sequenced schedule from work order details with dependencies.
reliability.moc_workflow: DRAFT → SUBMITTED → REVIEWING → APPROVED → IMPLEMENTING → CLOSED
reliability.ocr_desc: Find the optimal PM interval balancing cost vs risk.
reliability.rbi_desc: 5x5 probability x consequence risk matrix for static equipment.

dashboard.title: Executive Dashboard
dashboard.generate_report_first: Generate a monthly KPI report first to populate this view.
dashboard.no_traffic_light: No traffic light data available yet.
dashboard.no_monthly_reports: No monthly KPI reports found for this plant.
dashboard.select_kpi: Select a KPI and time range to view trends.
dashboard.cross_module_info: Provide analysis results to view cross-module correlations and bad actor overlaps.

reports.title: Reports & Data Management
reports.upload_info: Upload an Excel/CSV file or paste data below.

fmeca.title: FMECA Analysis
fmeca.rpn_table:
| Category | RPN Range | Action |
|----------|-----------|--------|
| LOW | 1 – 49 | Monitor |
| MEDIUM | 50 – 99 | Review mitigation options |
| HIGH | 100 – 199 | Implement risk reduction |
| CRITICAL | 200 – 1000 | Immediate action required |
fmeca.create_ws_first: Create a FMECA worksheet in the first tab to see the summary here.

defect_elimination.title: Defect Elimination & Root Cause Analysis
defect_elimination.subtitle: GFSN 5-stage DE process: Identify → Prioritize → Analyze → Implement → Control. Structured RCA with 5W+2H, Cause-Effect (Ishikawa), and 3-level root cause chain.
defect_elimination.rca_desc: Create and track RCA investigations per GFSN methodology.
defect_elimination.team_placeholder: J. Garcia, M. Benali, S. Dupont
defect_elimination.no_rcas: No RCA analyses found. Create one to get started.
defect_elimination.analysis_5w2h_desc: Level 1 structured analysis for simple events (REF-15 §5.2).
defect_elimination.enter_rca_id: Please enter an RCA Analysis ID.
defect_elimination.planning_kpi_desc: GFSN REF-14 §8 — Track planning performance with targets.
defect_elimination.de_kpi_desc: GFSN REF-15 §7.2 — Track DE program effectiveness.

equipment_chat.title: Equipment Manual Chat
equipment_chat.subtitle: Ask questions about equipment manuals and technical documentation in any language.
equipment_chat.no_api_key: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not configured. Set it in your .env file to use the equipment chat.
equipment_chat.using_library_only: No manual files found. Using equipment library data.
equipment_chat.welcome_message: Hello! I'm your equipment manual assistant. Ask me anything about **{equipment}** — maintenance procedures, troubleshooting, specifications, or component details. I can respond in your language.
equipment_chat.sq_maintenance: What are the main maintenance procedures?
equipment_chat.sq_troubleshooting: How do I troubleshoot common failures?
equipment_chat.sq_failure_modes: What are the most common failure modes?

role.desc_reliability_engineer: Failure analysis, FMECA, RCA & strategy optimization
role.desc_supervisor: Daily execution, task assignment & program tracking
role.desc_technician: Work requests, field capture & quality checklists
role.desc_consultant: Full workflow access — strategy to SAP delivery
role.desc_retired_expert: Expert portal for sharing diagnostic knowledge
role.not_primary_hint: This page is not in your primary tools as {role}. You can still use it.

deliverables.title: Deliverable Tracking
deliverables.no_deliverables: No deliverables found. Use the wizard to generate an execution plan and seed deliverables.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting Assistant
troubleshooting.subtitle: Guided Diagnostic Assistant — GAP-W02
troubleshooting.no_tree: No decision tree available for this equipment type.

wizard.title: Project Wizard
wizard.caption: Interactive project setup and execution plan generator
wizard.demo_mode_info: Pre-filled with OCP Jerada phosphate plant configuration.

expert_portal.title: Expert Consultation Portal
expert_portal.subtitle: Share your diagnostic expertise to help field technicians
expert_portal.enter_token: Enter or paste your consultation token to access the portal.
expert_portal.no_token: No consultation token provided. Check the link sent to you.
expert_portal.invalid_token: Invalid consultation link. Please check the URL or contact support.
expert_portal.token_expired: This consultation link has expired (24h limit). Contact the maintenance team for a new request.
expert_portal.guidance_placeholder: Describe your diagnostic recommendation... What should the technician check first? What is the most likely root cause?
expert_portal.fm_codes_help: Select applicable FM codes from the 72-combination ontology
expert_portal.guidance_required: Please enter your diagnostic guidance before submitting.
expert_portal.thank_you: Thank you for your expert contribution!
expert_portal.thank_you_detail: Your guidance has been recorded and will help improve future diagnostics. Compensation will be tracked automatically.
expert_portal.already_responded: You have already submitted your guidance for this consultation. Thank you!

expert_knowledge.title: Expert Knowledge Management
expert_knowledge.subtitle: Manage expert directory, consultations, knowledge pipeline, and compensation
expert_knowledge.escalation_auto_hint: All candidates are below 50% confidence after 3+ tests. Consider escalating to an expert.
expert_knowledge.escalation_description: Request guidance from a retired expert with relevant equipment knowledge.
expert_knowledge.expert_notified: Expert notified! You will receive their guidance when they respond.

financial.title: Financial Dashboard
financial.cost_drivers_info: Calculate financial impact per equipment to identify main cost drivers.
